hooks.command: node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const p=((JSON.parse(d).tool_input)||{}).file_path||'';if(/src\/.+\.(tsx?|ts)$/.test(p))console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'REMINDER: Any user-visible strings added must have entries in both src/messages/en.json and src/messages/ja.json'}}))"
